TAMIL  NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE 
[Part  VI—Sec. 1
NOTIFICATIONS BY HEADS OF DEPARTMENTS, ETC.
GENERAL NOTIFICATIONS
Conﬁ rmation of Variation to the Review Approved Gandhipuram Detailed Development Plan No. 1 of 
Thiruvallur Local Planning Area
(Roc. No. 10866/2018/DP1/TCP7)
No.VI(1)/104/2021.
In exercise of the powers conferred  under Section 33(2) of Town and Country Planning Act, 1971 the 
Commissioner of Town and Country Planning, Chennai-02 hereby conﬁ rms the following variation to the Deletion of 
F2 F2 30 feet wide Scheme Road in S.No. 70/2, (Ward:C, Block:9, T.S.No. 33) Periyakuppam Village, Thiruvallur 
Municipality, Thiruvallur District Thiruvallur Local Planning Area, approved by the Director of town and Country Planning 
proceedings in Roc. No. 31741/2002/DP1, dated 13-08-2013 and the fact of this approval in form No.12 published in the 
Tamil Nadu Government Gazette No. 36, Part-VI—Section-1 Page No. 363, dated 10-09-2003, Publication No.VI(1)/436/2003 
and the said draft notiﬁ cation published in Tamil Nadu Government Gazette No.36, Part-VI—Section-1, Page No.303 
dated: 05-09-2018, Publication No.VI(1)/315/2018.
2. Since no objections and suggestions have been received on this draft notiﬁ cation with in the stipulated time, the 
same are here by conﬁ rmed and ordered as below.
C඗ඖඎඑකඕඉගඑ඗ඖ ඗ඎ ඞඉකඑඉගඑ඗ඖ
1. Whenever the expression "Map No.5, DDP(V)/Sp1CTCP No.42/2001 occurs the expression DDP(V)/DTCP No.20/2018 
should be added at the end and to be read with.
2. In Schedule III Part-II (Form No.5) the against F2F2 Road in column 1 to 9 all the entries in all the column 
should be deleted.
Chennai-107, 
B. GANESAN,
16th March 2021. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Director of Town and Country Planning.
JUDICIAL NOTIFICATIONS
Destruction of Records in the Oﬃ  ce of the City Civil Court, Chennai-104
(Dis. No. 3954/2021/R.K-I.)
No.VI(1)/105/2021.
It is hereby notiﬁ ed for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the Destruction of Part-I 
records framed by High Court of Judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the Volume I 
of the Civil Rules of Practice and circular order, all documents produced by them and ﬁ led as exhibits in the Original 
Suits and connected Appeals, Original Petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the 
schedule hereto and all other documents which have been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the 
Original Suits. Applications and Original Petitions mentioned in the said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from 
the date of publication. 
List of Part-I Records in Original Suits for Destruction for the Year-1999
